h1.visual_description: Not visible on this page; inferred as the main chapter or section title.

h2.visual_description: Numbered list items in a standard serif font, acting as the primary structural markers for exercises or questions.
h2.example_text: 11. The map below identifies (with red markers) the locations of gas stations...

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Exercise or question number starting a new content block.
External hyperlink to web resources (e.g., YouTube).

visual_matchers.pattern: centered text directly below an image
all-caps sans-serif text in the bottom margin
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Page footer containing the document title and page number.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Direct source attribution text (e.g., 'Source: Google Maps')

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer text 'BEHAVIORAL ECONOMICS PRACTICUM' followed by a page number at the bottom right.
